title: Email for AI Week — Global Future Forum at OSU
html:
Outreach email Yahir drafted volunteering to help with the global future forum at oregon state (AI Week), explicitly hoping to meet jensen huang. Offers logistics, tech support, student liaison, post-event analysis.

TL;DR

  • global future forum at oregon state — AI showcase event Yahir tried to insert himself into operationally.
  • jensen huang (NVIDIA CEO) named as the personal-meeting target — early hardware/AI hero.
  • Template for Yahir's outreach emails approach — long enumerated value-add list, sincere "I want to meet X" tell.
  • Pairs with the wm leler email — same week, same mode, both about leveraging events for proximity to AI/tech veterans.

global future forum · jensen huang · oregon state · ai week · outreach emails · osu gdsc
